title: caralluma dicapuae subsp. turneri
intro: Caralluma dicapuae subsp. turneri, also known as Caralluma turneri, is a succulent plant species within the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to suppress appetite and aid in weight loss due to its high concentration of flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides. The health benefits associated with Caralluma turneri include enhanced endurance, improved physical performance, and reduced inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy among athletes and individuals seeking to improve their overall well-being. Caralluma turneri is typically prepared as a dietary supplement or herbal extract, often in capsule or powder form, which can be consumed before meals to help suppress appetite and support weight loss efforts.
